case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. IGNACIO CHAVEZ et al

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $196.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, IGNACIO INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA MAGNOLIA CLOTHES CARE
DECLARATION OF MARK SCHICKENDANTZ RE EQUIPMENT VALUATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

DECLARATION OF DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY RE: INTEREST CALCULATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, IGNACIO INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA MAGNOLIA CLOTHES CARE POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE TEXT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $9,585.85, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $1,325.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $196.30 COSTS, $160.43 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,681.73, IT IS FURTHER ORDERED AND ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF, TRINITY CAPITAL CORP., IS THE OWNER OF THE FOLLOWING LEASED EQUIPMENT: 4 EA 20#CAP.FRONT LOAD "ENERGY STAR", WHICH COLLECTIVELY HAS A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $3,500.00 AND IS ENTITLED TO ITS IMMEDICATE POSSESION, AND THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE & RECOVER SAID PROPERTY FROM DEFENDANT, IGNACIO V. CHAVEZ INDIVIDUALLY & DBA MAGNOLIA CLOTHES CARE. (SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH).
DECLARATION OF ANSON LOUIE RE: EVID CODE 1521, 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
